answer:
**The Falsafa corpus includes three parts of Allama Iqbal's *Bang-e-Dara* (1924), which contain several patriotic poems such as "Hindustani Bachon Ka Qaumi Geet" (*Bang-e-Dara Part 1*, ch. 26) and "Tarana-e-Milli" (*Bang-e-Dara Part 3*, ch. 23).**[^1][^2]

**However, the specific Urdu phrase "sare-jahan-se-achha" (سارے جہاں سے اچھا, lit. "better than all the worlds") from Iqbal's famous "Tarana-e-Hindi" ("Song of India/Hindustan") does not appear in any checked variants (original Urdu, transliteration, or English translation) across these works.** Searches for the phrase, close variants (e.g., "sare jahan", "saare jahaan se achha"), and English renderings (e.g., "better than the whole world", "better than the world") yielded zero results in English bodies.[^3] Chapter wiki cards and full texts for candidate patriotic poems (e.g., Part 1 chs. 2 and 26; Part 3 ch. 23) feature related motifs like "mera watan wohi hai" ("this is my homeland, this land of mine") or "saare zamane se nirale" ("unique from all the world"), but not the queried phrase.[^4][^5][^6]

**The corpus thus cannot provide a direct analysis of how "sare-jahan-se-achha" constructs an evaluative claim (e.g., via comparative particles like *se* linking *sare jahan* to *achha*) or why "better than the whole world" might over-translate it semantically, poetically, or grammatically.**

[^1]: *Bang-e-Dara Part 1*, metadata via `list_works(author="iqbal")`.
[^2]: *Bang-e-Dara Part 3*, ch. 23 "Tarana-e-Milli" ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-3-cc61e8/23-tarana-e-milli/translation/]).
[^3]: `search_corpus` results for "sare jahan se achha", "\"better than the whole world\"", etc.
[^4]: *Bang-e-Dara Part 1*, ch. 26 "Hindustani Bachon Ka Qaumi Geet", translation ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet/translation/]) & transliteration ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet/transliteration/]); refrain [p-da6786].
[^5]: *Bang-e-Dara Part 1*, ch. 2 transliteration ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/02-anokhi-waza-hai-saare-zamane-se-nirale-hain/transliteration/]); opens "saare zamane se nirale hain" [p-5f8984].
[^6]: *Bang-e-Dara Part 1*, ch. 26 wiki card ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c/wiki/26-hindustani-bachon-ka-qaumi-geet.card.md]).
